# YouTube Producer

> The producer's toolkit for YouTube. Free tools and data-driven articles for creators.

YouTube Producer is a suite of free tools and guides built for YouTube creators, producers, editors, and solo creators. Built by Becky Isjwara.

## Tools

- [Podcast Packager](https://packager.youtubeproducer.app): Turn podcast episodes into YouTube-ready packages with titles, descriptions, and timestamps.
- [Quote Carousel Generator](https://carousel.youtubeproducer.app): Create shareable quote carousels from video transcripts for Instagram and LinkedIn.
- [Next Video](https://nextvideo.youtubeproducer.app): Find your next video idea backed by data from channels one step ahead of yours.
- [Channel Audit](https://audit.youtubeproducer.app): Paste any YouTube channel and get a full data-backed analysis — performance tiers, title patterns, duration sweet spots, and AI recommendations.
- [SponsorAlert](https://sponsoralert.youtubeproducer.app): Never miss a sponsorship opportunity. Track brands, scan for launch intel, and generate outreach emails timed to product cycles.

## Guides

- [How to Never Miss a YouTube Sponsorship Again](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/never-miss-sponsorship): Brand outreach timing, cadence, and email strategy for creators.
- [The Creator's Guide to Tracking Brand Product Launches](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/track-brand-launches): Launch calendar, press events, and how to pitch before campaigns fill up.
- [How to Write a YouTube Media Kit That Gets Replies](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/youtube-media-kit): What to include, how to present stats, format options.
- [How to Find Brand Partnership Contacts Without a Manager](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/find-brand-contacts): LinkedIn, brand websites, agencies, and email patterns.
- [How to Repurpose One YouTube Video Into 10 Pieces of Content](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/repurpose-youtube-content): Short clips, carousels, newsletters, LinkedIn posts, and more.
- [How to Research Your YouTube Niche Before Starting a Channel](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/research-youtube-niche): Competitor analysis, gap-spotting, and niche sizing.
- [How to Spy on Your YouTube Competitors (Ethically)](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/spy-on-competitors): What to analyze, where to look, and the ethical line.
- [5 YouTube Channel Metrics That Actually Matter](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/youtube-metrics-that-matter): Median views, view-to-sub ratio, consistency, title patterns, duration.

## Data Studies

- [What YouTube Thumbnails Actually Get Clicks? (3,500-Thumbnail Study)](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/thumbnail-study)
- [When Should You Upload to YouTube? (3,500-Video Study)](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/upload-timing-study)
- [What Actually Drives YouTube Engagement? (3,500-Video Study)](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/engagement-study)
- [Does Video Length Actually Matter? (3,500-Video Analysis)](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/video-length-study)
- [How Fast Do YouTube Channels Actually Grow? (34-Channel Study)](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/channel-growth-speed)
- [What Title Formulas Actually Get Views? (3,500-Video Study)](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/title-formulas-study)
- [What Breakout YouTube Channels Do Differently (34-Channel Study)](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/breakout-channels-study)

- [Self-Development](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/niche-self-development)

- [Health](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/niche-health)
- [Education](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/niche-education)
- [Tech](https://youtubeproducer.app/articles/niche-tech)
